rust_quality.notes: Locked dependency graph, rustfmt, Clippy with warnings denied and workspace tests are release blocking.

service_mode_chaos.notes: PostgreSQL and JetStream restart, duplicate delivery and competing ownership are release blocking.

client_reconnect.notes: Event cursor restart and Runtime-owned PTY disconnect behavior are tested.

workspace_capacity.notes: Incremental indexing and release capacity are bounded.

backup_restore.notes: A real PostgreSQL backup and restore drill is part of production hardening.

migration_compatibility.notes: Upgrade compatibility and rollback checks are scripted.

security_audit.notes: RustSec, source/license policy, tenant boundaries and adapter activation are release blocking.

secret_leakage.notes: Tracked-source secret patterns and malicious plugin environment probes are tested.

plugin_isolation.notes: Linux native isolation and portable Wasmtime isolation are both qualified.

tenant_isolation.notes: Tenant-owned identities, schema isolation, RLS authority, quotas and cross-tenant not-found semantics are tested.

billing_idempotence.notes: Usage, webhook and Stripe operations are idempotent and entitlement state remains Runtime-owned.

portable_sandbox.notes: The import-free Wasmtime boundary is tested on Ubuntu, macOS and Windows with fuel, epoch, memory and output bounds.

adapter_certification.notes: Provider, plugin, deployment and billing adapters fail closed unless certification matches the exact build commit.

sbom.notes: A CycloneDX SBOM is generated from the locked Rust and VS Code manifests.

release_artifacts.notes: Checksummed archives, exact-commit certifications, SBOM and provenance attestations are required.

observability.notes: Release-blocking alerts and dashboards cover Runtime, scheduler, outbox, locks, providers and consumers.

runbooks.notes: Operational response, recovery, rollback, SaaS and adapter activation constraints are recorded.
